## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss content strategy, blog optimization, and technical implementation challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [44 articles published; focus on high-conversion enterprise topics](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need to improve blog design, add lead magnets, and implement better internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Technical challenges with Webflow implementation; considering shift to CMS for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Action items: investigate CMS migration, improve CTAs, and enhance indexing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [44 articles published, covering weekday content](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Prioritizing high-conversion enterprise topics and answering services](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Focus on attracting the right audience, not just high search volume](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

### Blog Optimization Strategies

  - [Planning to add lead magnets to the right side of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Considering dynamic insertion of CTAs within content for mobile users](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Aim to improve blog design for better user engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Discussing implementation of internal linking and related content sections](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)

### Technical Implementation Challenges

  - [Current blog setup not using Webflow CMS, limiting scalability](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Difficulties in implementing dynamic CTAs and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Considering migration to Webflow CMS for easier management and SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Lead Generation Tactics

  - [Primary CTA: "Get Started" for free AI agent demo](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Exploring options for micro-conversions (e.g., email capture, ebooks)](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Need to implement tracking for lead sources and article performance](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Planning to improve internal linking after publishing all articles](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Discussing URL structure and its impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Concern about potential loss of indexing if site architecture changes](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to investigate CMS migration options with the tech team within a week](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Daniel to explore solutions for dynamic CTA insertion in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Team to review current indexing status before making any major changes](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Consider updating blog layout to include inline banners and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Evaluate the possibility of converting existing articles to CMS format](https://fathom.video/share/LFudWKxiFzzrkjTANKm2vcKGcqraiUV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
